text.tspan: and height of the pouring hole.
Mould top is this horizontal line.
It should rise above the lip
of the handle — will be resized
the curves are much more natural.
If the foot is concave like this,
a three-part mould will be generated.
All text and strokes in the maker's mark
Make sure you remove any invisible shapes
like the one I used to curve the text!
